faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Find quick answers to common questions
faq.a1: eSIM is an embedded virtual SIM card. No physical card needed — just scan the QR code to activate.
faq.a2: iPhone XR/XS and newer all support eSIM. For Android, check Settings for 'Add eSIM'. China-mainland iPhones do NOT support eSIM.
faq.q3: How do I receive the eSIM after purchase?
faq.a3: After payment, the eSIM QR code and activation instructions are sent to your email instantly, usually within 1 minute.
faq.a4: Full refund available before activation (within 7 days). Once the QR code is scanned, refunds are not possible.
faq.a5: We accept credit cards (Visa/Mastercard), Apple Pay, Google Pay, and USDT cryptocurrency.

contact.a: Reach us via Telegram @Simryokoesimbot or email support@simryoko.com. We are online 24/7.

what_is_esim.a: eSIM is an embedded virtual SIM card. No physical card needed — just scan the QR code to activate.

check_compatibility.a: iPhone XR/XS and newer all support eSIM. For Android, check Settings for 'Add eSIM'. China-mainland iPhones do NOT support eSIM.

delivery.q: How do I receive the eSIM after purchase?
delivery.a: After payment, the eSIM QR code and activation instructions are sent to your email instantly, usually within 1 minute.

installation.q: How do I install the eSIM?
installation.a: Go to Settings → Cellular → Add eSIM, then scan the QR code from your email and follow the prompts.

usage.q: When does the eSIM start counting usage?
usage.a: The eSIM does not activate immediately after installation. It usually starts when you first connect to a local network.

refund.a: Full refund available before activation (within 7 days). Once the QR code is scanned, refunds are not possible.

topup.q: Can I top up when data runs out?
topup.a: Some plans support top-up/renewal. Check the top-up option on your order page.
